finding: Detecting mutable GitHub Action tags is insufficient unless each required replacement is represented by a complete, reviewed, immutable resolution record before workflow edits are accepted.

verification.method: isolated Node test against byte-identical authored files before commit
cases: action mismatch and unexpected entry rejected

limits: The validator does not independently resolve upstream tags.
A 40-character commit SHA provides immutability, not safety.
No Cloudflare deployment, hostname, or served commit is claimed.
The current workflows still contain mutable action references until reviewed resolutions are supplied and applied.
falsification_route: Provide an audit requiring two mutable references and a plan that omits one, uses a non-40-character SHA, changes the action identity, or adds an unexpected entry; the validator must reject it. After applying a complete plan, rerun the action-reference audit and require zero unpinned remote actions.
